intent: Turn AI Cognitive Diversity lineage work into an executable production evidence and launch program, not another thinking artifact.
owner: Tech 4 Humanity / Augmented Humanity Coach / Own Your AI

truth_constraints.source_basis: actual PCs and organisational environments, public websites, LinkedIn/reposts, product experiments, app lessons, signal/identity/consent/BCI lineage

required_workers.name: publication_lineage_crawler
required_workers.purpose: Find and capture all public websites, LinkedIn posts, reposts and public references for AICD, AI Sweet Spots, Own Your AI, CalmBound/Kids Safe, ConsentX, MyNeuralSignal, BCI governance and related lineage terms.
required_workers.done_when: Each claim has URL, date captured, screenshot/hash and source classification.

required_workers.name: deployment_evidence_registry_builder
required_workers.purpose: Create de-identified register of actual PCs / organisational environment evidence, including what was measured, where, when, and what can be publicly claimed.
required_workers.done_when: Every deployment claim is classified REAL/PARTIAL/BLOCKED with evidence type and redaction state.

required_workers.name: claims_ledger_generator
required_workers.purpose: Generate machine-readable claim ledger for poster, launch page, grant pack and media Q&A.

required_workers.name: visual_lineage_publisher
required_workers.purpose: Turn production program into a public-safe visual tree, executive one-pager and launch appendix.
required_workers.done_when: Public-safe version removes universities/grants/peer-review claims and shows supported-by line correctly.

required_workers.name: funding_partner_mapper
required_workers.purpose: Build list of grant, university, partner and hyperscaler funding targets to pursue after evidence pack is ready.
required_workers.done_when: At least 30 targets are scored by fit, urgency, evidence required and next action.

required_workers.name: ip_preparation_packager
required_workers.purpose: Package patent/trademark candidates without claiming granted protection.
required_workers.done_when: Each candidate has name, category, source artifact, novelty signal, risk and next legal step.

execution_rules.retry_policy: 3 tries in 2 hours, then route to next available worker and log blocker
execution_rules.hitl: only for credentials, legal signoff, destructive actions, paid filings, or private data release

bridge_next_action: Execute workers, write outputs into repo under lineage/evidence/, open/update issue with receipts, and return runtime receipt.
